author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Plan: Three fixes. Issue 3 (critical): GPU path in LinearFusedBackward (linalg.rs:946) always returns vec![grad_input, grad_weight, grad_bias] regardless of whether bias exists. CPU path (line 1011-1014) correctly conditionalizes. Fix: match the CPU pattern on the GPU path. Issue 1: batch_transpose (linalg.rs:317-346) does GPU→CPU→transpose→CPU→GPU roundtrip. Fix: add a GPU batch_transpose kernel or use permute+contiguous on GPU. Issue 2: GeluBackward erf mode (activation.rs:316-326) does GPU→CPU roundtrip. Fix: add a GPU gelu_backward_erf_f32 kernel, or use the existing elementwise GPU ops to compute the derivative on-device.
